HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: AI Coding Protocol powered by Google NotebookLM (RAG). Reduces IDE token usage by letting the AI focus purely on the code.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Browser Auth mechanism that securely bypasses bot detection systems.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Autonomous bot that researches the web and automatically imports findings into NotebookLM.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Full CRUD commands for notebooks, including setting goals and prompts.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Supports Text, URLs, PDFs, and Google Drive files with auto-sync capabilities.
HomePage.feature_5_desc: Instruct the AI to generate Audio Overviews (Podcasts), Mind Maps, Quizzes, and Study Guides.
HomePage.feature_6_desc: Prevents symlink hijacking and intercepts .env files from leaking into Git commits.

ManualPage.title: Comprehensive Manual
ManualPage.subtitle: Detailed documentation on architecture, installation, and tool usage.
ManualPage.intro_desc: This project wraps a reverse-engineered RPC Client connecting to NotebookLM inside an MCP Server. It features a middleware Orchestrator to handle asynchronous tasks (like Deep Research and Audio Generation) without causing timeouts.
ManualPage.install_desc: Clone the repository and install the dependencies to run the server.
ManualPage.auth_desc: The system requires cookies to access NotebookLM. Two methods are supported:
ManualPage.auth_sub_1_desc: Runs an automated script to launch Chrome. You manually log into Google, and the system securely extracts the session cookies.
ManualPage.auth_sub_2_desc: For environments without a display. Open NotebookLM in your local browser, copy the Cookie header from the Network tab, and use the 'authenticate' tool with method: 'manual'.
ManualPage.usage_desc: Add the following configuration to your claude_desktop_config.json to enable the MCP Server.
ManualPage.tools_desc: Once installed, your AI Agent gains access to the following tools:
ManualPage.tool_1_desc: Lifecycle management (create, delete, rename) and configure_chat to set AI objectives.
ManualPage.tool_2_desc: Manage data sources. Add files/URLs and use the sync command to refresh Google Drive documents.
ManualPage.tool_3_desc: List or delete generated media artifacts to clear project space.
ManualPage.tool_4_desc: Commands the AI to analyze notebook contents and answer deep contextual questions.
ManualPage.tool_5_desc: Commands the bot to conduct deep multi-step web research and import the final content into the notebook.
ManualPage.tool_6_desc: Transforms notes into alternative media such as Audio (Podcast), Quizzes, Slides, or Mind Maps.
ManualPage.notes_desc_1: Deep Research operations may take 3-5 minutes. The server manages polling automatically.
ManualPage.notes_desc_2: Audio Generation is highly resource-intensive. Ensure adequate sources are available in the notebook prior to generation.
